title: Run a safe plan-and-apply workflow
description: Move a change through fmt/validate, a reviewed saved plan, targeted apply, and a post-apply drift check.
body: Steps: 1. Run terraform fmt and terraform validate to catch syntax/type errors. 2. terraform plan -out=plan.tfbin and read the create/update/destroy/replace summary. 3. Have a human review any destroy or replace of stateful resources. 4. terraform apply plan.tfbin so only the reviewed diff executes. 5. Re-run plan to confirm zero drift (no changes). Rollback point: before step 4, while only the plan file exists and no change is live. Validation: the post-apply plan reports no changes and the apply output matches the reviewed plan; a green apply with surprise destroys is not success.
